# sakura_apprun_dedicated_application (Data Source)

Information about an AppRun dedicated application

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "main" {
  name = "Gkii8dvRskKjYOGzxL3D"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_application" "by_id" {
  id         = "A5F8D577-7395-4EB4-83D9-AC60A1EF2C5B"
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_application" "by_name" {
  name       = "OghqEsr1JMB06MNKz3dc"
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster ID that the certificate belongs to

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the application.
- `name` (String) The name of the application.

### Read-Only

- `active_version` (Number) The active version of the application
- `cluster_name` (String) The name of the cluster
- `desired_count` (Number) The desired count of the application
- `scaling_cooldown_seconds` (Number) The scaling cooldown seconds of the application
